title: Airwallex targets agentic commerce after hitting $11bn valuation
snippet: Business payments outfit Airwallex has hit an $11 billion valuation on a $320 million funding round as it gears up for a push into autonomous finance and agentic commerce.

title: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone
snippet: USDT0, backed 1:1 by tethers, the largest stablecoin by market capitalization, is the third-largest holder of USDT.

title: StablecoinX bets on Ethena ecosystem with Nasdaq debut
snippet: USDe circulating supply has shrunk by 70% since the October bull market peak, when it topped $14 billion.

title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
snippet: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

title: Kraken, Maple launch onchain warehouse facility for crypto-backed institutional loans
snippet: Kraken's new facility with Maple brings a traditional warehouse financing model onchain, allowing the exchange to expand its institutional crypto lending business using blockchain-based structured credit.

title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
snippet: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

title: Polish crypto exchange Kanga secures MiCA license in Latvia
snippet: Poland-founded crypto exchange Kanga has secured a Class 3 MiCA license in Latvia, enabling EU-wide crypto services as Polish lawmakers debate framework's implementation.

title: Sharplink buys Ethereum for first time in 8 months, adding 5,000 ETH: onchain analyst
snippet: The buy came days after a group of former Ethereum Foundation researchers launched Ethlabs, a nonprofit Sharplink helped fund.

title: BitGo cuts 15% of staff to refocus on AI infrastructure and stablecoins
snippet: BitGo CEO says the firm will now focus on key areas, including security, trading, stablecoins, settlement, and AI-powered infrastructure.

title: BitGo cuts 15% of staff to sharpen focus on AI, stablecoins

title: 21shares trims 2026 crypto forecasts despite institutional adoption gains
snippet: Asset manager 21shares sees crypto infrastructure advancing faster than prices, as ETFs, stablecoins and prediction markets mature while several 2026 targets slip.

title: ‘Stablecoin’ Google searches down 54% as supply growth stalls after 2025 boom
snippet: The decline in search volumes this month coincides with aggregate stablecoin supply having reversed its 10-month expansion.

title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
$47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
snippet: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

title: BIS warns of stablecoin 'structural flaws'
snippet: Stablecoins, as currently designed, have structural flaws that could affect macroeconomic and financial stability if they were to see widespread adoption, according to the Bank for International Settlements.
